parameters.query: SELECT param5 AS ad_id, COUNT(*) AS total_leads, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS depositors, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN cost ELSE 0 END), 2) AS crm_revenue FROM leads WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) GROUP BY param5

SELECT ad_id, ROUND(AVG(position), 1) AS avg_position, MIN(position) AS best_position, COUNT(*) AS scans FROM position_tracking WHERE scanned_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND ad_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ad_id
SELECT country_code, country_name, geo_id, avg_payout, avg_approval, max_cpl, min_bid, max_bid FROM geo_payouts WHERE is_active = TRUE
